summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FitBeats platform - backend APIs working well (96% success rate), critical frontend Select component bug found in admin panel

critical_bugs.issue: React Select component error: SelectItem with empty value prop causes runtime error
critical_bugs.error_message: A <SelectItem /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string

ui_bugs.issue: Admin panel becomes unusable due to Select component error

passed_tests: Frontend login page load and form elements
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix Select component bug in AdminPage.js line 728 - change empty string value to null or remove the empty option. This prevents admin panel from functioning.
